overall.description: A cinematic game sequence from Fort Solis showing a character first interacting with a laptop displaying a video call and security systems, then exploring a dimly lit industrial facility with red emergency lighting and foggy exterior views.

segments.scene_description: The scene opens with a third-person view over the shoulder of a hooded figure sitting at a cluttered desk in a dimly lit office. The character interacts with a laptop showing a video call with a man in a teal shirt, then navigates through a security system interface displaying camera feeds and equipment menus.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow corridor connecting office to storage room

events.description: transitions from seated at desk to standing and moving toward the exit
exits room 03 into narrow industrial corridor with hazard signage

agents.ego_description: standing up from desk and walking briskly through doorway into corridor

entered.detail: metal door marked with 03 and warning signs
industrial metal walls with piping and conduits
illuminated hazard warning sign with red and white stripes

segments.scene_description: The character closes the laptop displaying the Fort Solis logo, stands up from the desk, and walks through a door marked 03 into a narrow industrial corridor with metal walls and emergency signage.

scene_state.functional_zone: storage room with large foggy windows and red emergency lighting

events.description: enters room bathed in red emergency lighting with bright foggy windows
examines round industrial containers near the large windows
approaches glowing orange furnace machinery at the far end of the room

agents.ego_description: exploring the storage room, examining containers and walking toward the glowing machinery

entered.detail: floor-to-ceiling windows showing foggy exterior with diffused daylight
stacked industrial crates and round red-topped containers
industrial machinery with bright orange glowing interior and control panels
metal shelving units with boxes and supplies

segments.scene_description: The character enters a storage room illuminated by red emergency lighting and natural light filtering through large foggy windows. The room contains stacked industrial containers, metal shelving, and a glowing orange furnace at the far end which the character approaches while exploring the space.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a cramped, dimly lit office into a vast industrial storage area bathed in emergency light. It begins over the shoulder of a hooded figure interacting with a laptop's video call and security interface at a cluttered desk. As the character closes the laptop and stands, the camera follows them through a door marked 03 and into a narrow industrial corridor defined by metal walls and emergency signage. The scene then opens into a large storage room where the lighting shifts to a mix of red emergency glows and pale light filtering through foggy windows. Finally, the camera tracks the character past stacked containers and metal shelving as they approach a glowing orange furnace at the far end of the space.
